description: A new product requires a 12-month stability study to determine its shelf life. A QA specialist needs to set up the study protocol in the LIMS.

nodes.task_description: Create a new stability study protocol for the new product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the new study record.

nodes.task_description: Define the storage conditions (e.g., 25°C/60% RH, 40°C/75% RH) and the testing timepoints (e.g., 0, 3, 6, 9, 12 months).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly configures the study parameters.

nodes.task_description: Specify the tests to be performed at each timepoint and activate the protocol.

expected_outcome.value: Agent links the required tests to the protocol, which will now automatically generate test requests at the scheduled intervals.
